name: universal-design-system
description: Production-grade AI-native design system with 9 palettes, 600 W3C DTCG tokens, 43 components, BM25 reasoning engine, and WCAG 2.2 AA compliance.

skills.name: universal-design-system
skills.description: Core design system skill — domain detection, BM25 search, rule engine, palette selection, token resolution, Tailwind/React/Vue/Svelte output

skills.name: brand-identity
skills.description: Generate complete brand identity systems with color psychology, typography pairings, and visual identity rules

skills.name: design-audit
skills.description: Audit existing UIs for WCAG accessibility, color contrast, typography hierarchy, and spacing consistency

skills.name: ui-styling
skills.description: CSS/styling helper using design tokens — copy-paste snippets with dark mode variants and responsive breakpoints

skills.name: slides-design
skills.description: Generate presentation design systems with slide templates, typography rules, and color schemes

skills.name: pre-pr-review
skills.description: Deep code review and CI simulation — Biome lint, TypeScript type-check, Vitest, SonarCloud code smell detection

agents.name: pre-pr-reviewer
agents.description: Autonomous CI simulation — mirrors quality.yml + ci.yml pipeline locally, auto-fixes issues

agents.name: palette-sync
agents.description: Synchronizes palette tokens from design-tokens.json into all 8 docs pages (144 CSS blocks)

agents.name: a11y-remediator
agents.description: Diagnoses and fixes WCAG accessibility failures across 144 axe-core tests

agents.name: metrics-aligner
agents.description: Computes actual project metrics and updates all documentation references

agents.name: component-scaffold
agents.description: Generates complete React component scaffolding — TSX, tests, CSV entry, ARIA attributes

agents.name: docs-sync
agents.description: Validates and synchronizes shared elements across all 8 HTML documentation pages

commands.name: pre-pr-review
commands.description: Run CI simulation before creating a PR

commands.name: palette-sync
commands.description: Sync palette tokens into docs pages

commands.name: a11y-fix
commands.description: Diagnose and fix accessibility test failures

commands.name: align-metrics
commands.description: Align documented metrics with actual counts

commands.name: docs-sync
commands.description: Sync shared elements across docs pages

tools.name: search_design_system
tools.description: BM25 search across 20 CSV databases with domain detection

tools.name: get_palette
tools.description: Retrieve full token set for any of 9 palettes (light/dark)

tools.name: get_component
tools.description: Look up component by slug with variants, states, accessibility

tools.name: generate_tokens
tools.description: Full reasoning pipeline to JSON/Tailwind/CSS-in-JS output

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List all components with names and categories

tools.name: get_anti_patterns
tools.description: Industry-specific anti-patterns to avoid by sector

prompts.name: component-selection
prompts.description: Select right components for a product type
